---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement that would unlock a research use case.
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: Manik-Maurya
---

## Research use case
What scientific or educational workflow would this feature enable? Please describe the problem you are trying to solve, not just the feature you imagine.

## Proposed feature
A clear, focused description of what you would like ConfusionMapper to do.

## Alternatives considered
What other tools, scripts, or workarounds have you tried? Why are they insufficient?

## Compatibility
Would this change affect existing users? If yes, sketch a migration path.

## Willingness to contribute
- [ ] I would be willing to submit a pull request implementing this feature.
- [ ] I would be willing to help test a pull request from someone else.
- [ ] I am requesting only, I cannot contribute code at this time.
